week_1_checklist.title: 📋 Week 1: Settling the Storm - Objectives
week_1_checklist.content:
**Week 1 Focus: Foundation Building**

✅ **Priority Tasks:**
• Upgrade Furnace to Level 10
• Unlock Titanium Alloy Factories
• Reach Profession Level 40+
• Secure initial cities on map
• Stock Coal reserves
• Prepare for Cold Wave (arrives Day 4-5)

⚠️ **Important:** Use Valor Badges on Wednesday for maximum EXP boost!

📅 Week 1 ends in: {days_until_next_week} days
🔥 Furnace Level: {furnace_level}
💪 Alliance Power: {alliance_power}

cold_wave_warning.title: ❄️ COLD WAVE INCOMING
cold_wave_warning.content:
**Cold Wave Alert - Action Required!**

⚠️ **Immediate Actions:**
• Fuel your equipment at Furnace NOW
• Stock Coal reserves (check alliance stocks)
• Verify Virus Resistance (VR) levels
• Move troops to heated zones if needed

❄️ **Cold Zones** will require heating to survive!

📍 Duration: Ongoing until further notice
🔥 Furnace Status: {furnace_level}
⛽ Coal Reserves: {coal_reserves}

**Don't get caught in the cold unprepared!**

valor_badge_wednesday.title: 🎖️ VALOR BADGE DAY - Wednesday
valor_badge_wednesday.content:
**TODAY is the best day to use Valor Badges!**

💡 **Why Wednesday?**
• Maximum EXP boost active
• Most efficient profession leveling
• Push to reach next breakpoint

📊 **Current Stats:**
• Alliance Average: Level {avg_profession_level}
• Target for Week: Level {target_profession_level}

⚠️ **Don't waste badges on other days!**

React with 🎖️ when you've used your badges today!

faction_war_prep.title: ⚔️ FACTION WAR PREPARATION
faction_war_prep.content:
**Faction War starts {faction_war_countdown}!**

📌 **Rally Leaders Assigned:**
• Main: {r5_name}
• Backup: [Assign R4s]

✅ **Pre-Event Checklist:**
□ Activate all buffs (Profession, Furnace, Hero, Recon)
□ Fuel equipment for cold zones
□ Stock healing speedups
□ Switch to PvP spec/loadout
□ Join voice channel 15min early

🎯 **Strategy:**
• Focus on tower control first
• Rotate rally leads to avoid cooldowns
• Scout before engaging
• Coordinate in voice chat

⏰ Event Time: {faction_war_time}
👥 Expected Attendance: React with ⚔️ to confirm!

**See you on the battlefield!** 💪

rare_soil_competition.title: 💎 RARE SOIL SPAWN ALERT

week_2_checklist.title: ❄️ Week 2: Cold Frontline - Objectives
week_2_checklist.content:
**Week 2 Focus: Expansion & Survival**

✅ **Priority Tasks:**
• Fuel equipment for Cold Zones
• Expand map control before Rare Soil spawns
• Level up VR (Virus Resistance) for PvE
• Continue Furnace heating operations
• Prepare for Week 3 PvP intensification

💡 **Tip:** Dump badges on Wednesday!

📅 Week 2 ends in: {days_until_next_week} days
🗺️ Cities Controlled: {cities_controlled}
💪 Alliance Power: {alliance_power}

week_3_checklist.title: 🔥 Week 3: Heat Check & PvP Rise
week_3_checklist.content:
**Week 3 Focus: Competition Intensifies**

✅ **Priority Tasks:**
• City pushes intensify - coordinate attacks
• Rare Soil spawns activate (Day 2-3)
• Prepare for unavoidable competitive PvP
• Secure strategic positions before Week 4
• Stock resources for extended battles

💎 **Rare Soil Alert:** First spawns this week!

📅 Week 3 ends in: {days_until_next_week} days
💎 Soil Locations: {rare_soil_count}
💪 Alliance Power: {alliance_power}

week_4_checklist.title: 💪 Week 4: Midseason Power Spike
week_4_checklist.content:
**Week 4 Focus: Consolidate Dominance**

✅ **Priority Tasks:**
• Secure and defend Rare Soil locations
• Hit critical upgrade breakpoints
• Maintain city control
• Prepare for Week 5 Rare Soil Race
• Assess alliance positioning

📊 **Midseason Assessment:**
• Current Rank: {alliance_rank}
• Soil Held: {rare_soil_count}
• Power Growth: {power_change_percent}%

📅 Week 4 ends in: {days_until_next_week} days
💪 Alliance Power: {alliance_power}

week_5_checklist.title: 💎 Week 5: Rare Soil Race - CRITICAL
week_5_checklist.content:
**Week 5 Focus: Turning Point**

🚨 **CRITICAL WEEK FOR ENDGAME**

✅ **Priority Tasks:**
• Maximum effort on Rare Soil control
• Key city control battles
• Prepare for final push (Weeks 6-7)
• Scout enemy positions
• Coordinate full alliance participation

🎯 **This week determines trajectory!**

📊 **Current Standing:**
• Alliance Rank: {alliance_rank}
• Soil Locations: {rare_soil_count}
• Power: {alliance_power}

📅 Week 5 ends in: {days_until_next_week} days

**Every contribution matters!** 💪

week_6_checklist.title: ⚔️ Week 6: Soil War - FULL CONFLICT
week_6_checklist.content:
**Week 6 Focus: All-Out War**

🔥 **MAXIMUM INTENSITY**

✅ **Priority Tasks:**
• Full-scale Rare Soil warfare
• Defend current locations at all costs
• Coordinate attacks on enemy soil
• PvP and tactical positioning dominant
• Prepare for final week sprint

📊 **War Status:**
• Alliance Rank: {alliance_rank}
• Soil Locations: {rare_soil_count}
• Major Enemies: [Top 3 competitors]

📅 Week 6 ends in: {days_until_next_week} days

**Fight for every inch!** ⚔️

week_7_checklist.title: 🏆 Week 7: ENDGAME - Final Push
week_7_checklist.content:
**Week 7 Focus: Final Sprint**

🎯 **LAST CHANCE FOR SEASON REWARDS**

✅ **Priority Tasks:**
• Final Rare Soil sprint
• Maximize season rewards
• Alliance placement finalization
• Secure leaderboard position
• Give everything you've got!

📊 **Final Standings:**
• Current Rank: {alliance_rank}
• Soil Locations: {rare_soil_count}
• Season Reward Tier: {reward_tier}

⏰ **Season ends in: {days_until_season_end} days**

**Leave nothing on the table!** 🏆💪

Season 2 has been an incredible journey!

season_end.title: 🏁 Season 2: Polar Storm - COMPLETE
